title: Plumb proxy param through transport.rs signatures
description:
Add proxy: Option<String> parameter to all four transport functions in core/src/transport.rs and update all call sites to pass None. No proxy logic yet — this is pure signature plumbing.

## What
Thread the proxy parameter through connect(), connect_with_retry(), connection_manager(), and open_authenticated_ws() so it is available when the SOCKS5 implementation lands.

## Algorithm
1. In core/src/transport.rs:
   a. Add 'proxy: Option<String>' as the last param to open_authenticated_ws()
   b. Add 'proxy: Option<String>' as the last param to connection_manager() — pass it through to open_authenticated_ws
   c. Add 'proxy: Option<String>' as the last param to connect() — pass it through to open_authenticated_ws call
   d. Add 'proxy: Option<String>' as the last param to connect_with_retry() — pass it through to connection_manager spawn
2. Update all external call sites to pass None:
   a. relay/tests/e2e_jsonrpc.rs — all connect() calls (lines ~84-89, ~150-155): add None as last arg
   b. relay/tests/stress.rs — connect_with_retry() call (line ~165): add None as last arg
   c. cli/src/commands.rs line ~260 — connect_with_retry() call: add None as last arg
3. Run: cargo build --workspace exits 0; cargo test --workspace exits 0.

## Defensive programming rules
- proxy param is Option<String>, not ProxyConfig — validation happens in main.rs before this layer
- Do not add any proxy parsing or logic in this bead — leave a TODO comment '// proxy tunneling: see open_authenticated_ws impl bead'
- Do not remove or alter the existing accept_invalid_certs path
- All new None arguments must compile without clippy warnings

## Agent team
Researcher (read transport.rs + all call sites), Implementer (add params + update call sites), Validator (cargo build/test)

## Tests
Acceptance: cargo build --workspace exits 0; cargo test --workspace exits 0. The test suite must not change in behavior — all existing tests still pass with None proxy.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build --workspace exits 0; cargo test --workspace exits 0
